title: Dual use headphone case with component
abstract: A headphone device case, in particular, a dual use case that can be used as both a standard headphone case and a component for personalization of the headphone casing.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS We claim: 1. A casing for a headphone device equipped with a component comprising: a) a housing accommodating a formed shaped indentation within the said casing; b) a component provided to the housing of the said casing within the shaped indentation, c) a guide part including a plurality of fasteners provided to and projected from said casing within the shaped indentation and configured to guide the component, which is to be connected to said casing, to a connecting position. 2. The headphone device case of claim 1, wherein the said housing is comprised of different materials. 3. The headphone device case of claim 1, wherein the said shaped indentation having formed recessed configurations. 4. The headphone device case of claim 1, wherein the said component is dimensioned and shaped corresponding to the formed recessed configuration. 5. The headphone device case of claim 1, wherein the said component contains a personalization area on an outside wall of the component for displaying a brand, company name, sports team, music group, flag, commercial symbol, trade logo, label, emblem, insignia, copyrighted item, and/or personage. 6. The headphone device case of claim 1, wherein the said guide part is comprised of a plurality of fasteners, comprised of both male and female connectors connecting the said component to the said case. 7. The headphone device case of claim 1, wherein the said fasteners comprise magnets, Velcro, Dual Lock, Xolok and/or closure elements. 8. The headphone device case of claim 1, wherein the said fasteners connect the said 

 component to the said case, enabling the said component to be switched interchangeably on the said case in the said guide part in the shaped recessed indentation on the said case.
